================================================================================
                           SETUP STEPS ON VPS
================================================================================

1. SSH into VPS with password:
   ssh root@152.42.242.180
   (Password: %0|F?H@f!berhO3e)

2. Create .ssh directory:
   mkdir -p ~/.ssh
   chmod 700 ~/.ssh

3. Add public key:
   echo "ssh-rsa  workgrid@152.42.242.180" >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
   chmod 600 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys

4. Exit dan test SSH key:
   exit
   ssh -i C:\Users\PC\.ssh\workgrid_vps root@152.42.242.180

================================================================================
                         CONNECTION COMMANDS
================================================================================

From Windows CMD/PowerShell:
  ssh -i C:\Users\PC\.ssh\workgrid_vps root@152.42.242.180

From Git Bash:
  ssh -i ~/.ssh/workgrid_vps root@152.42.242.180

Or use alias (after adding to ~/.ssh/config):
  ssh workgrid-vps

Upload files to VPS:
  scp -i C:\Users\PC\.ssh\workgrid_vps -r C:\path\to\files root@152.42.242.180:/root/workgrid/

Download files from VPS:
  scp -i C:\Users\PC\.ssh\workgrid_vps -r root@152.42.242.180:/root/workgrid/files C:\path\to\save\

================================================================================
                              SECURITY
================================================================================

✓ Keep private key safe - DO NOT share!
✓ Private key permissions should be 600 (-rw-------)
✓ After SSH key setup, disable password authentication on VPS
✓ Use SSH key for all future connections

Disable Password Auth (on VPS):
  sudo nano /etc/ssh/sshd_config

  Find and change:
  PasswordAuthentication no
  PubkeyAuthentication yes

  Then restart:
  sudo systemctl restart sshd
